faqs.question: What pests are most common in Harlem apartments and homes?
faqs.answer: Harlem properties frequently deal with German cockroaches, mice, bed bugs, and ants. Older brownstones and pre-war buildings may also experience occasional issues with rats and silverfish. Our general pest control service addresses all these common pests with targeted treatments.

faqs.answer: Our general pest control services in Harlem range from $175 to $300, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Monthly maintenance plans are available at discounted rates.

faqs.answer: Yes, we provide general pest control for all property types throughout Harlem, including apartments, brownstones, restaurants, retail stores, office buildings, and places of worship.
